---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
bioquik count --patterns "**CG**" --seq-dir ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include full error output / traceback).

## Environment

- bioquik version: <!-- `python -c "import bioquik; print(bioquik.__version__)"` -->
- Python version: <!-- `python --version` -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 -->
- Installation: <!-- `pip install bioquik` or editable clone -->
